MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-14-2017 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-19-2017 Continued To Sep-11-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS JEANETTE OMRAN and GEORGE OMRAN'S Motion For Leave To File Third Amended Complaint
is GRANTED in part. Plaintiffs may file their proposed third amended complaint, but must delete paragraph 11 therein. Paragraph 11 eleven alleges facts that are contradictory to factual allegations in plaintiffs' prior complaints and plaintiffs do not provide a satisfactory explanation for the change in allegations. (Weil and Brown book at 6:706). Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PAUL A. FRASSETTO OF THE FRASSETTO LAW OFFICES, TEL. NO. 1-415-354-2700 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JOHN P. GIRADE OF THE MURPHY PEARSON BRADLEY & FEENEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-788-1900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT ELYSA YANOWITZ'S DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT as to the elder abuse cause of action in the second amended complaint is OVERRULED. Plaintiffs have adequately alleged a claim per Welfare & Institutions Code 15610.30. Plaintiffs have sufficiently alleged improper conduct by Mr. Yanowitz which he knew or should have known would be harmful. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/hk
